commands.purpose: Load the project bead workflow instructions before implementation
Confirm bead status, acceptance criteria, and implementation context
commands.observed: CL-du1x was in_progress and matched the supplied acceptance criteria.

commands.purpose: RED gate for AC1 before production code
commands.observed: Failed for the expected reason: missing_dry_run_paths contained all three handler roots; real removal also ran before the assertion.

GREEN gate for AC1 after remove_agent handler-root deletion

commands.purpose: RED gate for AC2 before production code
commands.observed: Failed for the expected reason: new_handler_targets were not installed after a handler-only catalog change.

commands.command: git add tests/test_library_py_installers.py && git commit -m "test(CL-du1x): red \u2014 handler catalog change reinstalls"
commands.purpose: Commit the AC2 red test before production code
GREEN gate for AC2 after cmd_use handler drift detection

commands.observed: 13 failures were sandbox/environment failures from installer cache writes under /Users/malte/.local/share/library, outside the writable roots; rerun used a writable XDG_DATA_HOME.

commands.command: rm -rf /private/tmp/cl-du1x-xdg && XDG_DATA_HOME=/private/tmp/cl-du1x-xdg UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py
commands.purpose: Full changed-file regression run with writable installer cache

commands.command: git add scripts/library.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-du1x): green \u2014 reinstall on handler catalog changes"
commands.purpose: Commit the AC2 production change after focused and file-level tests passed
Verify the codex REGRESSION fix: remove_agent() rejects an unsafe name before any deletion
commands.observed: 5 passed, 135 deselected. New parametrized test test_agent_remove_rejects_unsafe_name_without_deleting proves the error_result envelope and that the sentinel handler directory survives for names '../shared', '..', 'a/b', 'a\\b', 'sub/agent'.

commands.command: XDG_DATA_HOME=$(mktemp -d) uv run pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py -k 'unsafe_name or remove_all_deletes_installed_handler or remove_cursor_harness_rejected or remove_all_harness_includes_opencode' -v
commands.purpose: Confirm the name guard does not regress existing remove_agent happy-path and cursor-rejection behavior
commands.observed: 8 passed, 132 deselected. Existing remove tests (handler dir deletion, cursor rejection, all-harness opencode target) still pass alongside the 5 new unsafe-name cases.

skipped_checks.reason: The bead explicitly constrained verification to tests for changed files and one full run of tests/test_library_py_installers.py.
This Codex implementation run is expected to be recorded automatically by the codex-impl adapter when RUN_ID is set; no reliable token counters were exposed in-session for manual fallback values.
